expo.name: Nereye
expo.description: AI receipt scanner and personal expense tracker.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nereye needs camera access so you can scan receipt photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nereye needs photo library access so you can choose receipt photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Nereye needs camera access so you can scan receipt photos.
plugins.photosPermission: Nereye needs photo library access so you can choose receipt photos.
